<div class="col-md-3 article-toc d-none d-md-block">
= Contents =
  - [[#Beamer|Beamer]]
    - [[#Beamer#定制标题|定制标题]]
    - [[#Beamer#参考文献分页|参考文献分页]]

</div>
<div class="col-md-9 article-main">
%template article_template
= Beamer =
== 定制标题 ==
{{{class="latex"
\newcounter{mynumber}

\makeatletter
\setbeamertemplate{subsection in toc}{
    \leavevmode\leftskip=5ex%
  \llap{%
    \usebeamerfont*{section number projected}%
    \usebeamercolor[bg]{section number projected}%
    \vrule width2.25ex height1.85ex depth.4ex%
    \hskip-2.25ex%
    \setcounter{mynumber}{\inserttocsubsectionnumber}%
    \hbox to2.25ex{\hfil\color{fg}\alph{mynumber}\hfil}}%
  \kern1.25ex\inserttocsubsection\par}
\makeatother 
}}}
== 参考文献分页 ==
{{{class="latex"

\begin{frame}[allowframebreaks]
\frametitle{参考文献}
\bibliography{开题报告}
\bibliographystyle{plain}
\end{frame}
}}}
